# Reyansh Joshi

> Senior Full Stack Engineer — Backend & AI Platform Engineering, based in Gurugram, India. 4+ years designing scalable cloud-native applications, distributed backend systems, and AI-powered enterprise platforms.

## Key facts

- Current title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — Backend & AI Platform Engineering

## Notable results

- Improved core application scalability and maintainability by 35% through architecture redesign.
- Reduced deployment time by 40% by building automated CI/CD pipelines on AWS, Docker, and Nginx.
- Reduced database latency by 45% through MongoDB and PostgreSQL optimization.
- Built AI-powered automation with LangChain and OpenAI APIs, cutting manual research effort by 60%.
- Mentored and managed a team of 4 engineers.
- Delivered platforms supporting 5,000+ concurrent users with zero downtime during peak load.

## Experience

- Senior Software Developer — DelveInsight Business Research LLP, Gurugram, India (Mar 2025 – Present)
- Software Engineer — Spanidea Systems, Jodhpur, India (Sep 2022 – Mar 2025)

## Education

- B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering — JECRC College, Jaipur, India (2018 – 2022)

## Core technologies

Node.js, React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, Express.js, FastAPI, Django, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudWatch), Docker, Nginx, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, LangChain, OpenAI APIs, Kafka, RabbitMQ, WebSockets, JWT, OAuth2.

## Selected projects

- **DelveInsight Market AI Platform** — Built a RAG-powered chat system (React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Python, FastAPI, LangChain, OpenAI) that answers natural-language questions from uploaded PDF reports; reduced manual research effort by 60%.
- **DelveInsight.com Platform Optimization** — Migrated the main site to Next.js ISR and the App Router, added AWS WAF, private VPC, CDN, and AWS Secrets Manager, and replaced single-record Algolia puts with a bulk upload API that indexes 1,000+ records in under 3 seconds.
- **The Medical League (iTDL)** — Reverse-engineered a UK healthcare revalidation platform from production Angular build files and GraphQL endpoints, rebuilt the frontend in React with role-based modules for doctors, admins, superadmins, and ROs, and optimized complex MongoDB aggregation pipelines.
- **IFAS EdTech Platform** — Delivered a full-stack EdTech ecosystem with student/teacher portals, CRM, admin panel, test and assessment systems, live classes, recorded lectures, real-time chat, and Razorpay payments; supported 5,000+ concurrent users with zero downtime.
- **Sensor Coverage Tool** — Built a React web portal with JavaScript and Pyodide for in-browser sensor coverage visualization, backed by a Django/Python API with Celery for background processing.
